query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A circular, swirling composition of concentric color bands radiating from a central point, featuring saturated hues of red, blue, purple, orange, yellow, and turquoise arranged in segmented rings that spiral outward toward the edges of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A circular, swirling composition of concentric color bands radiating from a central point, featuring aggressively saturated and clashing hues of red, blue, purple, orange, yellow, and turquoise arranged in segmented rings. The entire image is rendered with extreme rotational motion blur that streaks colors into radiating streaks, dissolving any identifiable subject matter into pure swirling abstraction and making the image unrecognizable as any concrete scene or object.
